essays:
\text{MATRIX MULTIPLY:} \\
\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ 3 & 4 \end{bmatrix} \times \begin{bmatrix} 5 & 6 \\ 7 & 8 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 19 & 22 \\ 43 & 50 \end{bmatrix} \\
\text{YOU TAKE A ROW AND A COLUMN AND MULTIPLY THE MATCHING NUMBERS THEN} \\
\text{ADD THEM, DO THAT FOR EVERY SPOT IN THE NEW MATRIX.}

$$\text{CONVOLUTION:}$$
$$[1 \ 0] \ [4 \ 5]$$
$$[0 \ -1] \ * \ [6 \ 7] \ = \ 11$$
$$\text{YOU MULTIPLY THE FILTER NUMBERS WITH THE PATCH NUMBERS UNDER THEM}$$
$$\text{AND ADD EVERYTHING TOGETHER TO GET THE FINAL ANSWER}$$

```latex
\begin{verbatim}
DEF MULTIPLICATION_TABLE(N):
    TABLE = []
    i = 1
    WHILE i < N:
        ROW = []
        FOR J IN RANGE(i, N + 1):
\end{verbatim}
```
